description_long: This is a humanoid figure dressed in a full-body protective suit, reminiscent of a hazmat or space suit, with a prominent helmet featuring a dark, opaque visor. The suit is bulky, with reinforced joints and visible seams, and includes a large, rigid backpack-like apparatus attached to the back, likely for life support or equipment storage. The arms and legs are covered in the same protective material, with gloves and boots integrated into the design. The helmet is angular with a white top and a wide, dark face shield, providing full head coverage. The suit has several black patches and fasteners, suggesting reinforced or functional areas. The overall appearance is utilitarian and designed for hazardous or specialized environments.
description: A humanoid figure in a bulky protective suit with a large helmet and backpack apparatus, designed for hazardous environments. The suit features reinforced joints, integrated gloves and boots, and a dark visor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full helmet, dark visor, chest details, and both arms and legs with reinforced joints.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding backpack apparatus and the angular profile of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large, smooth backpack and the back of the suit, with minimal detail on the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the backpack attachment and the side of the helmet.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body protective suit with helmet and integrated boots and gloves
